1.solution: MP_Abra=5k, MP_Babra=9k. SP_Babra=9kГ—0.75Г—0.80=5.4k. SP_Abra=5.4kГ—(2/3)=3.6k. 5kГ—0.9Г—(1вҲ’a/100)=3.6k вҶ’ (1вҲ’a/100)=0.8 вҶ’ a=20%. Answer: A.

2.solution: New SP=old SP+12150. Old SP=0.75CP (25% loss); new SP=1.25CP (25% gain). 0.75CP+12150=1.25CP вҶ’ CP=24300. No constraint on MP вҶ’ ratio CP:MP cannot be determined. Answer: D.

4.solution: Profit=18вҒўВІ/вӮҶвӮҒ% of SP вҶ’ profit/SP=11/61 вҶ’ CP/SP=50/61 вҶ’ SP=1.22CP. New: CP'=0.92CP, SP'=1.22CPвҲ’1008=1.18Г—0.92CP=1.0856CP вҶ’ 0.1344CP=1008 вҶ’ CP=7500. Not in options. Answer: D (None of these).

9.solution: Senior=70%, junior=30%. Senior funds=80%F at avg 2400: 70Г—2400=0.80F вҶ’ F=210000. Junior funds=42000 among 30 members вҶ’ avg=42000/30=1400. Answer: A.
